results.title: India’s balance of payments likely to swing to surplus in FY27: Report
results.description: India's balance of payments is expected to hit a surplus in FY27, driven by strong FDI inflows and a narrowed current account deficit. A new Care Edge Ratings report highlights key growth factors and export trends shaping the economic outlook.
